close_out_reason: Set 044 Session 4 close via S4a+S4b checkpoint-split. S4b deliverables (claude-narration-results.md + cross-backend-synthesis.md) authored, Round A verification via gemini-pro returned VERIFIED with 3 forward-looking nice-to-haves applied to cross-backend-synthesis.md §8. Cumulative Set 044 routed spend $0.292 of $15.00 NTE.

manual_verify_attestation: Round A verification via ai_router.query → gemini-pro returned VERIFIED on the S4b bundle (claude-narration-results.md + cross-backend-synthesis.md + spec.md S4 excerpt + narration-design.md + copilot-narration-results.md, 113578 chars, 35477 in / 1352 out, $0.0578663). Verifier artifact committed at docs/session-sets/044-ai-chat-log-discovery-and-experiments/verification-output/round-a-session-4b-result.json. Three Section G nice-to-haves applied as cross-backend-synthesis.md §8 additions (items 6, 7, 8) covering hook-channel delivery reconsideration, Branch A/B simplification, and potential S5 re-design expansion. S4a Round A + Round B verification artifacts (round-a-session-4a-result.json + round-b-session-4a-result.json) also committed in the same commit b7f0e16.
